mapper.insert: insert into calender ( MEM_ID, PLACE, CAL_TEXT, TYPE_CD, SHARING_CD, STATE_CD, CAL_START, CAL_END) values ( #{memId}, #{place}, #{calText}, #{typeCd}, #{sharingCd}, #{stateCd}, #{calStart}, #{calEnd})
mapper.update: update calender set PLACE = #{place}, CAL_TEXT = #{calText}, SHARING_CD = #{sharingCd}, TYPE_CD = #{typeCd}, CAL_START = #{calStart}, CAL_END = #{calEnd} where id = ${id}
